summary: Comprehensive button functionality testing across Arabic crowd management app. Fixed critical GateMapPage bug (RefreshCw icon not imported). All backend CRUD APIs verified working. Frontend UI buttons for shifts, employees, floors all functional.

fixed_issues.issue: ReferenceError: RefreshCw is not defined - Icon used but not imported from lucide-react
fixed_issues.fix: Added RefreshCw to the lucide-react import statement on line 4-9

tests: Add Shift dialog opens with all fields (name, start/end time, color, category)
Account actions (activate, freeze, reset-pin) - backend API works
PUT edit prohibited item (new endpoint) - works
Add Floor dialog opens with name (AR/EN), order, image upload fields
Live indicator 'مباشر' with green pulsing dot - visible
No refresh button present (using WebSocket) - confirmed
Dashboard loads with KPIs and department cards

seed_data_creation: Test employees, shifts, tasks, prohibited items, zone categories, and floors created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CRUD button functionality verified working. GateMapPage RefreshCw import bug was fixed. Backend tests cover all endpoints. No remaining button functionality issues found.

rca_of_the_issue.bug: GateMapPage crashed with 'RefreshCw is not defined'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The RefreshCw icon from lucide-react was used on line 438 in a button but was never imported in the import statement at the top of the file
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added RefreshCw to the import list on lines 4-9
rca_of_the_issue.prevention: Use ESLint rules to catch undefined references before runtime
